name: VideoVault Premiere Extension
releaseNotes:
- Bumped the Premiere extension release line to `1.8.2`.
- Fixed the background helper so it uses the correct extension-version resolver at runtime.
- Kept the UI and proxy-request behavior otherwise unchanged from `1.8.1`.
- Updated the shipped extension version to `1.8.2`.
- Replaced stale `getExtensionVersionFromManifest()` calls in `client/background.js` with the background-safe `getExtensionVersion()` helper.
- Prevented the Windows background agent from crashing on startup before event emission.
- Extension version bumped to `1.8.2`.
- Update `extensions/adobe-premiere/latest.json` in `videovault-release-updates` after packaging the new macOS and Windows installers.
- Release tag should follow:
- `premiere-extension-v1.8.2`
